response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The song lyrics mostly match the Reference JSON, though slight variations were noted in the second chorus ('better than ever', 'sweeter than ever') which were prioritized over the JSON text. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was used for song lyrics; however, the initial 2.5 minutes of dialogue required manual transcription and translation of mixed Indonesian and English. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are tightly synchronized with vocal bursts. Aggressive truncation was applied during rapid dialogue and song transitions to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: Untungnya lagunya santai, easy listening, jadi kita sambil keliling-keliling kan nyapa fans, gitu ya?
subtitles.english: Fortunately, the song is chill and easy listening, so we can walk around and greet the fans, right?

subtitles.original: Asyik banget ya tadi ya? Aku juga suka banget tadi dance bagian reff-nya ya?
subtitles.english: It was so much fun! I also really liked the dance during the chorus!

subtitles.original: Dala dala dala da...
subtitles.english: Dala dala dala da...

subtitles.original: Itu... itu beda lagu gak?
subtitles.english: Wait... is that a different song?

subtitles.original: Gak gitu deh... kayaknya...
subtitles.english: I don't think it was like that... probably...

subtitles.original: Ya tapi pokoknya asyik lah ya kalau nyanyi lagu chill santai-santai kayak gini.
subtitles.english: Anyway, it's fun to sing chill, relaxing songs like this.

subtitles.original: Iya santai dong. Tapi...
subtitles.english: Yeah, it's relaxing. But...

subtitles.original: ...ngomongin soal santai, kita tuh sebenarnya belum bisa santai dulu. Hei, santai!
subtitles.english: ...speaking of relaxing, we actually can't relax just yet. Hey, chill!

subtitles.original: Karena kayaknya katanya gak boleh santai...
subtitles.english: Because apparently we're not allowed to relax...

subtitles.original: Iya! Iya! Rileks!
subtitles.english: Yeah! Yeah! Relax!

subtitles.original: Iya iya iya, jangan santai-santai. Jangan terlalu santai.
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, don't get too relaxed. Don't be too chill.

subtitles.original: Karena konsernya tuh masih panjang!
subtitles.english: Because the concert is still long!

subtitles.original: Jadi sebelum itu, kalian ada gak yang mau kalian sampaiin dulu?
subtitles.english: So before that, is there anything you guys want to say first?

subtitles.original: Mulai dari ini nih, yang gak bisa diem.
subtitles.english: Let's start with this one, who can't stay still.

subtitles.original: Tiga kata saja. I love you.
subtitles.english: Just three words. I love you.

subtitles.original: Keren! The best! Sangat jelas ya.
subtitles.english: Cool! The best! Very clear.

subtitles.original: Tetap semangat, tetap semangat menjalani hidup ya. Udah gitu aja.
subtitles.english: Stay spirited, keep the spirit in living your life. That's all.

subtitles.original: Pokoknya sampai akhir masih panjang. Semangat!
subtitles.english: Anyway, it's still a long way to the end. Keep it up!

subtitles.original: Saranghaeyo! Gomawoyo!
subtitles.english: I love you! Thank you!

subtitles.original: Oke kalau aku... ya, semangat selalu!
subtitles.english: Okay, as for me... yeah, always stay spirited!

subtitles.original: Semangat santai! Hidup jangan terlalu dibawa serius.
subtitles.english: Chill spirit! Don't take life too seriously.

subtitles.original: Semangat santai ya?
subtitles.english: A chill spirit, huh?

subtitles.original: Semangat santai!
subtitles.english: Chill spirit!

subtitles.original: Oke kalau gitu kita lanjutkan...
subtitles.english: Okay then, let's continue...

subtitles.original: Wait wait wait, tunggu dulu!
subtitles.english: Wait, wait, wait, hold on!

subtitles.original: Sebelum selesai-selesai ini nih ya, kita teriak bareng-bareng penonton dulu gak sih?
subtitles.english: Before we wrap this up, why don't we shout together with the audience?

subtitles.original: Iya dong! Ayo! Ayo ayo ayo!
subtitles.english: Of course! Let's go! Come on!

subtitles.original: Oke oke. Jadi kita teriak bareng ya, dalam hitungan tiga.
subtitles.english: Okay, okay. So we'll shout together on the count of three.

subtitles.original: Kita sama-sama teriak Chromatic Future. Oke ya?
subtitles.english: We'll all shout "Chromatic Future" together. Okay?

subtitles.original: Oke oke, Chromatic Future! Gitu kan ya?
subtitles.english: Okay, okay, Chromatic Future! Like that, right?

subtitles.original: Iya iya kayak gitu, kayak gitu.
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, just like that.

subtitles.original: Oke langsung ya, sambil lihat sini sini sini... sambil lihat...
subtitles.english: Okay, let's do it, while looking here, here, here...

subtitles.original: Aku ya, aku, aku yang penonton ini nih...
subtitles.english: Me, me, I'll take this audience...

subtitles.original: Iya iya, kalau gitu yang ini center ya...
subtitles.english: Okay, then this one will be the center...

subtitles.original: Yapoo~
subtitles.english: Yapoo~

subtitles.original: Oke bareng-bareng ya. Satu, dua, tiga!
subtitles.english: Okay, together now. One, two, three!

subtitles.original: CHROMATIC FUTURE!
subtitles.english: CHROMATIC FUTURE!

subtitles.original: Everything was easy
